productName: Const Rosin AIO Hype 2.0 Device Dulce De Uva 1g
description: A grab-and-go hybrid disposable of Dulce de uva, the simplest way to vape: flavorful, portable, and zero setup required. Grab-and-go convenience, with notes of grape, vanilla, and diesel, delivering an even, best-of-both-worlds feel.
